# Suburban Construction — Quad Cities Home Improvement

Suburban Construction is a family-owned home improvement contractor serving the Quad Cities
(Davenport IA, Bettendorf IA, Moline IL, Rock Island IL) and a 90-mile radius since 1985.
We specialize in replacement windows, vinyl and steel siding, entry and storm doors, seamless
gutters, gutter protection systems, and patio enclosures and awnings.

## About

- Founded: 1985 (40+ years in business)
- Installations: 40,000+ installations completed
- Service area: Quad Cities and surrounding 90-mile radius across Iowa and Illinois
- Showroom: 3602 North Harrison, Davenport, Iowa 52806
- Phone: 563-391-4000 (local) | 1-800-717-3066 (toll-free)
- Hours: Monday–Friday 7:30 AM – 4:30 PM
- Reviews: 4.7 stars across 111+ Google reviews
- Warranty: Lifetime workmanship guarantee on all installations

## Products & Services

### Replacement Windows
Single hung, double hung, slider/glider, bay and bow, casement, awning, garden, basement,
egress, and storm windows. Triple pane krypton glass is our specialty — the most
energy-efficient residential window option available.

### Siding
Freedom Series vinyl siding, insulated vinyl siding, steel siding, and composite siding.
Available in dozens of colors and profiles. Virtually maintenance-free.

### Doors
Entry doors (custom-ordered) and storm doors (Larson Platinum Collection). Easy Vent storm
doors, mini-blind doors, and a full door catalog available.

### Gutters
Custom-fabricated seamless gutters (on-site roll-forming), Gutter Cap system (surface
tension leaf protection), and Shur Flow micro-mesh gutter guard system.

### Patio
Patio enclosures, retractable and fixed awnings, canopies, solar shades, and swing-and-clean
porch windows.

## Cities Served

Davenport IA, Bettendorf IA, Moline IL, Rock Island IL, East Moline IL, Sterling IL,
Rock Falls IL, Muscatine IA, Clinton IA, DeWitt IA — and the surrounding 90-mile radius.

## Content Policy

This site welcomes indexing by AI assistants and language model crawlers. All page content
is freely accessible. Only /api/ routes and the form confirmation page (/sent) are excluded.
Structured data (JSON-LD) is present on all pages including LocalBusiness, Product, FAQPage,
HowTo, BreadcrumbList, and DefinedTermSet schemas.
